title: ononis reclinata var. monophylla
intro: Ononis reclinata var. monophylla, also known as the dwarf sainfoin, is a perennial plant in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, due to its high fiber and nutrient content. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and has been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Ononis reclinata var. monophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its health benefits, although more research is needed to fully confirm its effects on human health.
